/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/client.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/client.dir/client/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/third_party/glad/src/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/Entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/Map.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/PowerUp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/Power_Ups.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/Tile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/EBO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/VAO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/VBO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/ShaderClass.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/Tile_Manager.cpp.o -o client  third_party/glfw/src/libglfw3.a third_party/glm/glm/libglm.a -lenet -ldl -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so -ldl
